briefdescription.para: left viewport, right viewport
lower viewport, upper viewport

detaileddescription.para: left lower vp, left upper vp, right lower vp, right upper vp

briefdescription.para: Click without modifiers, selects one object and unselects all others.
Ctrl+Click, toggles the selection of one object.

memberdef.name: ImGuiMenuMultiListener

briefdescription.para: Hidpi scaling to be used for text rendering.

detaileddescription.para: Ratio between the framebuffer size and the window size. May be different from the hipdi scaling!

briefdescription.para: user defined additional scaling modifier
ImGui Context.
last focused plugin window
if true, then pre_draw will start from polling glfw events
be careful here with true, this can cause infinite recurse
updated in drawSelectionInformation_
flag to correctly update scroll on transform window appearing
menu will change objects' colors in this viewport
When editing feature properties, this is the target object.
When editing feature properties, this is the original xf of the target object, for history purposes.
whether to open the Edit Tag modal dialog
buffer string for the tag name input widget
This class helps the viewer to renderUi() from IRenderObjects.
Easy-to-customize callbacks.
This is triggered whenever a name tag of an object is clicked.
This is called every frame for every viewport. Use this to draw UI bits on top of the scene.
Mouse IO.
Keyboard IO.
Scene events.
Spacemouse events.
Touchpad gesture events.

memberdef.argsstring: (float deltaX, float deltaY, bool kinetic) override
memberdef.name: touchpadSwipeGestureUpdate_

briefdescription.para: Other events.

detaileddescription.para: This function reset ImGui style to current theme and scale it by menu_scaling called in ImGuiMenu::postRescale_()

briefdescription.para: draw additional selection information (e.g. for custom objects)
A virtual function for drawing of the dialog with shortcuts. It can be overriden in the inherited classes.
returns width of items in Scene Info window

memberdef.definition: static MRVIEWER_API const std::shared_ptr< ImGuiMenu > & MR::ImGuiMenu::instance
memberdef.name: instance

briefdescription.para: This function is called when the viewer is initialized (no mesh will be loaded at this stage)
inits glfw and glsl backend
call this to validate imgui context in the begining of the frame
call this to draw valid imgui context at the end of the frame
This function is called before shutdown.
Draw menu.
Can be overwritten by callback_draw_viewer_window
Can be overwritten by callback_draw_custom_window

memberdef.argsstring: (const Viewport &viewport, const Vector3f &pos, const Vector3f &normal, const std::string &text, const Color &color, bool clipByViewport)
memberdef.name: draw_text

briefdescription.para: returns UI scaling modifier specified by user
sets UI scaling modifier specified by user
opens Error / Warning / Info modal window with message text
setup maximum good time for frame rendering (if rendering is slower it will become red in statistics window)
Draw scene list window with content.

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::vector< std::shared_ptr< Object > > &selected, const std::vector< std::shared_ptr< Object > > &all)
memberdef.name: draw_scene_list_content

briefdescription.para: Draw scene list content only.

detaileddescription.para: override this to have custom "Selection Properties" window draw window with content
override this to have custom "Selection Properties" content draw content only

briefdescription.para: override this to have custom UI in "Selection Properties" window (under "Draw Options")

detaileddescription.para: override this to customize appearance of collapsing headers

briefdescription.para: override this to customize appearance of collapsing headers for transform block

briefdescription.para: expands all objs parents in tree and scroll scene tree window so selection becomes visible
set show shortcuts state (enable / disable)
return show shortcuts state (enable / disable)
enables using of saved positions of plugin windows in the config file
returns true if enabled using of saved positions of plugin windows in the config file, false otherwise
This class helps the viewer to renderUi() from IRenderObjects.
Behaves as if the user clicked the object name tag, by invoking nameTagClickSignal.
This version uses the currently held keyboard modifiers instead of a custom mode.
Scene pick should be disabled because an ImGui window is in the way.
Scene pick should be disabled because a renderUi() UI of some object is in the way.

detaileddescription.para: ======== selected objects options drawing getting the mask of the list of selected objects
